<p dir="auto">Codemods in this repo are written using <a href="https://docs.codemod.com/jssg" rel="nofollow">jssg</a> (JS ast-grep) — TypeScript transformation scripts that operate on ASTs generated by ast-grep. See the <a href="https://docs.codemod.com/jssg" rel="nofollow">jssg docs</a> for the full API reference.</p>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> Type-check all codemods</span>
pnpm check-types</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
